globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.blob.core.windows.net; connect-src 'self' https://*.clerk.com https://*.clerk.dev https://*.clerk.accounts.dev https://*.azurewebsites.net; frame-src https://*.clerk.com https://*.clerk.dev https://*.clerk.accounts.dev; worker-src 'self' blob:
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=()
